name: Verify Admin can promote Reader to Manager
description:
Invite member1 to organization with User role.
Invite member1 to project with Reader role.
Verify that:
    - Admin can promote Reader to Manager
descriptionHtml:
Invite member1 to organization with User role.
Invite member1 to project with Reader role.
Verify that:
- Admin can promote Reader to Manager

testStage.description:
Invite member1 to organization with User role.
Invite member1 to project with Reader role.
Verify that:
    - Admin can promote Reader to Manager

retries.statusDetails:
AssertionError: [AssertionError] during step: Signup new user via UI and activate email verification link
Message: [TimeoutError] during step: Click signup button on Signup username page
Message: Locator.click: Timeout 30000ms exceeded.
Call log:
  - waiting for locator("button").filter(has_text="Sign up")

Note: Playwright Timeout. Element not found or action took too long.
